headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 19, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, securing a 13-4 victory behind Cody Bellinger's 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. In other action, the Cincinnati Reds edged the Minnesota Twins 5-4, while the Chicago Cubs took down the New York Mets 2-4. The Tampa Bay Rays outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates 8-7, and the Washington Nationals secured a shutout victory over the San Francisco Giants 3-0.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Joey Loperfido (Houston Astros) who was placed on the 10-day injured list with a right quad strain. James McArthur (Kansas City Royals) was transferred to the 60-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, while Jhoan Duran (Philadelphia Phillies) was placed on the 15-day injured list with a left oblique strain. Other injured players include Prelander Berroa (Chicago White Sox), Cade Horton (Chicago Cubs), Jorge Polanco (New York Mets), Patrick Wisdom (Seattle Mariners), and Zach McKinstry (Detroit Tigers).

Several teams made notable roster moves, including the Houston Astros trading RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott, while the New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers, and the Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for international bonus pool money.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Royals 13-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, securing a 13-4 victory. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Kyle Nicolas earning the win after a strong relief appearance. Tony Santillan earned the save, while Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with 2 RBI.

top_news.title: **Mets Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets dropped a 2-4 decision to the Chicago Cubs, with Carson Kelly leading the Cubs' offense. Jameson Taillon earned the win for the Cubs, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a hard-fought win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, outlasting their opponents 8-7. Cedric Mullins led the Rays' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Shut Down Giants in 3-0 Rout**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a shutout victory over the San Francisco Giants, winning 3-0. Robbie Ray led the Nationals' pitching effort, while Rafael Devers, Drew Gilbert, Curtis Mead, and Keibert Ruiz were among the impact hitters in the game.

top_news.title: **Pirates Take Down Rays 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays in their recent matchup. Junior Caminero and Nick Gonzales led the Pirates' offense, while Jake Mangum and Bryan Reynolds contributed for the Rays.

top_news.title: **Astros Place Joey Loperfido on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have placed left fielder Joey Loperfido on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 18, 2026, due to a right quad strain.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees in exchange for SS Braden Shewmake. Shewmake joins the Astros' roster after the trade.
